code:
%% Sequence Diagram: Play Command Flow %% Purpose: Shows the complete flow when a user executes /play command %% Author: Discord Bot Team %% Last Updated: 2025-11-03 sequenceDiagram autonumber actor User as 👤 Discord User participant Discord as Discord API participant Gateway as Gateway Service participant Redis as Redis Pub/Sub participant Audio as Audio Service participant DB as PostgreSQL participant Lavalink as Lavalink participant YouTube as YouTube API Note over User,YouTube: User wants to play a song in voice channel %% Command Initiation User->>Discord: /play query: "never gonna give you up" activate Discord Discord->>Gateway: INTERACTION_CREATE event activate Gateway Note over Gateway: Validate interaction
Check permissions Gateway->>Discord: POST /interactions/{id}/callback
(ephemeral: "🎵 Processing...") Discord->>User: Show processing message deactivate Discord %% Command Processing Gateway->>DB: SELECT * FROM guild_settings
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Gateway: Guild settings (if exists) deactivate DB Gateway->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:commands
{ type: 'play', query: '...', guildId, ... } activate Redis Note over Redis: Message queued in pub/sub Redis->>Audio: Message delivered deactivate Redis activate Audio %% Audio Service Processing Note over Audio: Extract query and guild info Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Current queue (if exists) deactivate DB %% Search for Track alt Query is YouTube URL Note over Audio: Parse YouTube URL
Extract video ID else Query is search term Audio->>Lavalink: GET /loadtracks?identifier=ytsearch:{query} activate Lavalink Lavalink->>YouTube: Search API request activate YouTube YouTube-->>Lavalink: Search results deactivate YouTube Lavalink-->>Audio: Track results (top 5) deactivate Lavalink Note over Audio: Select first result end %% Cache Search Results Audio->>Redis: SETEX search:{query} 300 {results} activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Add to Queue alt Queue is empty Note over Audio: This will be the first track Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(guildId, title, url, position, ...) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created (position: 0) deactivate DB %% Start Playback Audio->>Lavalink: POST /sessions/{sessionId}/players/{guildId}
{ encodedTrack, voice: {...} } activate Lavalink Note over Lavalink: Create player
Connect to voice channel Lavalink->>Discord: Voice connection (UDP) activate Discord Discord-->>Lavalink: Voice connection established deactivate Discord Lavalink->>YouTube: Stream audio data activate YouTube Note over Lavalink: Download and encode audio YouTube-->>Lavalink: Audio stream deactivate YouTube Lavalink->>Discord: Send opus packets (UDP) activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Audio playback in voice channel deactivate Discord Lavalink-->>Audio: Player updated event deactivate Lavalink else Queue has tracks Note over Audio: Add to end of queue Audio->>DB: SELECT MAX(position) FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: maxPosition deactivate DB Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(guildId, title, url, position: maxPosition + 1, ...) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created deactivate DB end %% Update Cache Audio->>Redis: SET queue:{guildId} {...}
EX 3600 activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Send UI Update alt First track (now playing) Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{ type: 'nowPlaying', track: {...}, ... } activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: UI update message deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: POST /channels/{id}/messages
{ embeds: [nowPlayingEmbed], components: [...] } activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Now Playing: Song Title
[Controls: ⏯️ ⏭️ 🔊 🔁 ...] deactivate Discord Gateway->>Discord: DELETE /webhooks/{id}/messages/@original
(Remove "Processing..." message) activate Discord deactivate Discord else Added to queue Gateway->>Discord: POST /webhooks/{id}/messages/@original
{ content: "✅ Added to queue (position: X)", ephemeral: true } activate Discord Discord->>User: ✅ Added to queue (position: 5) deactivate Discord end deactivate Gateway deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: User hears music playing in voice channel %% Track Events loop Every 5 seconds Lavalink->>Audio: PlayerUpdate event
{ position, connected: true } activate Audio Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:to-discord
{ type: 'playerUpdate', position, ... } activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Player update event deactivate Redis Note over Gateway: Update UI if needed
(progress bar, time) deactivate Audio end %% Track End Note over Lavalink,Audio: Track finishes playing Lavalink->>Audio: TrackEnd event
{ reason: 'finished' } activate Audio Audio->>DB: DELETE FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Deleted deactivate DB Audio->>DB: UPDATE queue SET position = position - 1
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue reindexed deactivate DB alt More tracks in queue Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Next track deactivate DB Note over Audio: Play next track
(repeat playback flow) else Queue empty and autoplay enabled Note over Audio: Generate autoplay recommendation Audio->>Audio: Get similar tracks
based on last played Note over Audio: Add to queue and play else Queue empty and autoplay disabled Audio->>Lavalink: DELETE /sessions/{sessionId}/players/{guildId} activate Lavalink Lavalink-->>Audio: Player destroyed deactivate Lavalink Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{ type: 'queueEmpty' } activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Queue empty event deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: PATCH /channels/{id}/messages/{id}
{ content: "Queue finished", components: [] } activate Discord Discord->>User: Queue finished (no controls) deactivate Discord end deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: Flow complete

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的/play命令流程图，从用户在Discord输入命令开始，一直到音乐实际播放出来。这个流程涉及好几个服务，我想先确认一下整体结构。
好的，我理解是从用户侧发起。那除了Discord API，还有哪些核心参与者？我看到你提到了好几个服务。
核心参与者有六个：Gateway Service负责接收和分发命令，Redis Pub/Sub做消息队列，Audio Service处理核心业务逻辑，PostgreSQL存队列数据，Lavalink负责音频解码和传输，还有YouTube API用来搜歌。
明白了，我已经把这六个服务都加进去了。现在从用户输入/play query: "never gonna give you up"开始画，Discord API收到后触发INTERACTION_CREATE事件给Gateway，对吗？
对，Gateway要先验证权限，然后立刻回一个ephemeral的"🎵 Processing..."消息，让用户知道在处理了。这个很重要，不然用户会觉得卡住了。
好的，processing消息已经画上去了。接下来Gateway要去查guild_settings？
是的，查guildId对应的设置，然后Gateway把命令publish到Redis的discord-bot:commands频道，带上type、query、guildId这些信息。Audio Service订阅了这个频道，会消费这条消息。
Redis消息队列画好了。现在Audio Service激活，它要先查当前队列状态？
对，Audio查queue表看有没有现有歌曲。然后这里有个分支：如果用户给的是YouTube URL就直接解析，否则要走搜索流程。搜索的话Audio调用Lavalink的/loadtracks接口，用ytsearch前缀。
Lavalink和YouTube API的交互我要确认一下：是Lavalink直接调YouTube API搜索，然后返回top 5结果给Audio Service？
没错，Lavalink封装了YouTube的搜索，Audio拿到top 5之后选第一个结果。然后Audio要把搜索结果缓存到Redis，key是search:{query}，TTL设300秒。
缓存步骤加上了。接下来是加入队列的逻辑，这里我看到你之前提到有分支？
关键分支：如果队列为空，这是第一首歌，position设为0，而且要立即开始播放；如果队列有歌，就查maxPosition，新歌曲position设为maxPosition + 1，加到队尾。
播放流程我有点疑问：Audio怎么让Lavalink开始播放的？还有语音连接是怎么建立的？
Audio POST到Lavalink的/sessions/{sessionId}/players/{guildId}，带上encodedTrack和voice配置。Lavalink然后跟Discord建立UDP语音连接，连接成功后从YouTube拉音频流，编码成opus包发给Discord。
语音连接和播放流程都画好了。那UI更新部分呢？用户应该能看到now playing信息和控制按钮。
对，如果是第一首歌，Audio publish到discord-bot:ui:now频道，Gateway收到后发embed消息到频道，带控制按钮⏯️⏭️🔊🔁这些，同时删掉之前的processing消息。如果是加入队列，就回复"Added to queue (position: X)"。
UI更新分支完成了。我看到后面还有个每5秒的循环更新？
是的，Lavalink每5秒发PlayerUpdate事件给Audio，带上position和connected状态，Audio publish到discord-bot:to-discord，Gateway用来更新进度条和时间显示。
循环更新画好了。最后歌曲结束后的处理逻辑呢？
Lavalink发TrackEnd事件，Audio先删queue里position 0的歌，然后把剩下所有歌曲position减1重新索引。之后有三个分支：还有歌就继续播放下一首，重复之前的播放流程；没歌但开了autoplay就推荐相似歌曲；没歌且没开autoplay就销毁player，发queueEmpty事件，UI显示"Queue finished"并且去掉控制按钮。
确认一下autoplay disabled的情况：Audio调Lavalink DELETE /sessions/{sessionId}/players/{guildId}销毁player，然后通过Redis通知Gateway更新Discord消息？
完全正确。Gateway收到queueEmpty后PATCH那条消息，内容改成"Queue finished"，components设为空数组，用户就看不到控制按钮了。整个流程到这里结束。
好的，整个/play命令的完整流程图已经画好了，从用户输入命令到音乐播放，包括队列管理、搜索缓存、语音连接、UI更新和播放结束后的处理，所有分支和循环都覆盖到了。
